title: Sterile Processing Technician
description: Mass General Brigham is recruiting a Sterile Processing Technician to support our Seattle medical center operations. You'll manage sterilization and instrument processing for surgical suites, ensuring the highest safety and quality standards. This hybrid role offers flexibility while maintaining critical on-site presence.
responsibilities: Decontaminate, inspect, and process surgical instruments and medical equipment according to strict protocols
Operate sterilization equipment; monitor cycles and validate sterilization effectiveness
Maintain organized inventory of sterile instruments; track usage and reorder stock
Document sterilization records and equipment maintenance; ensure compliance with regulations
Support surgical services; communicate any equipment issues to supervisory staff

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; completion of sterile processing technician program
